zh.Dymock, Forest of Dean District, Glouce: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hankyns於1525年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾代莫可時，他的父親Thomas Hankyns26歲，母親Anne Hungerford14歲。他於1541年5月9日與Elyzabeth Shelley在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾代莫可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1569年11月25日享年44歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾代莫可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hankyns于1525年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾代莫可时，他的父亲Thomas Hankyns26岁，母亲Anne Hungerford14岁。他于1541年5月9日与Elyzabeth Shelley在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾代莫可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1569年11月25日享年44岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾代莫可。

nameMeanings.name: Hankyns
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hankin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Hankin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yaron, Abbe, Isadore, Myer, Yitzhak.

English: from the Middle English personal name Hankin, a pet form of Hann , which in English usage was usually a short form of Hanry (Henry), and occasionally perhaps a rhyming pet form of Randal (Randolph). In Middle Dutch, Hankin was a pet form of Johan (John), a usage which may have been brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no examples have yet been found in Middle English where a man named John was also called Hankin. Compare Henkin , Hanks , and Hancock .
English: from Middle English Handekin, a pet form of the personal name Hand, Hond (see Hand ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hankyns was born in 1525, in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Thomas Hankyns, was 26 and his mother, Anne Hungerford, was 14. He married Elyzabeth Shelley on 9 May 1541, in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 25 November 1569, at the age of 44, and was buried in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hankyns est né en 1525, à Dymock, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Hankyns, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne Hungerford, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Elyzabeth Shelley le 9 mai 1541, à Dymock, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1569, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Dymock, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.Dymock, Forest of Dean District, Glouce: Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Hankyns 1525 in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Hankyns 26 und seine Mutter Anne Hungerford 14. Er hat am 9. Mai 1541 in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Elyzabeth Shelley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 25. November 1569 im Alter von 44 Jahren und wurde in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hankyns è nato il nel 1525 nel Dymock, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Hankyns, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Anne Hungerford, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Elyzabeth Shelley il 9 maggio 1541, nel Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 novembre 1569, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Dymock, Gloucestershire, England.

ko.Dymock, Forest of Dean District, Glouce: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디
ko.lifeSummary: John Hankyns(이)가 1525년 영국 그루스스터실르 디모c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hankyns(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Hungerford(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1541년 5월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 디모c크에서 Elyzabeth Shelley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1569년 11월 25일 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 디모c크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hankyns nasceu em 1525, em Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Hankyns, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne Hungerford, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Elyzabeth Shelley em 9 de maio de 1541, em Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1569, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Dymock, Forest of Dean District, Glouce: форест оф дин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hankyns родился в 1525 г. в местности димокк, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Hankyns было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Hungerford, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Elyzabeth Shelley 9 мая 1541 г. в местности димокк, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 25 ноября 1569 г. в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности димокк, глоусестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Elyzabeth Shelley el 9 de mayo de 1541, en Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas.
